summary: Doc build failed because importing the transformers package raised a SyntaxError caused by unresolved merge conflict markers in modeling_utils.py, which aborted conversion of docs/source/en/model_doc/llama.md to MDX.
root_cause: A SyntaxError was raised due to unresolved merge conflict markers ('<<<<<<< sonic-moe') present in transformers/modeling_utils.py, preventing the package from being imported and causing the documentation build to fail while converting ../transformers/docs/source/en/model_doc/llama.md.

evidence.reason: Shows the exact file and line where the error occurred during import.
This is an unresolved merge conflict marker present in the source file, which is invalid Python syntax.
The Python interpreter reported a syntax error, consistent with the presence of merge conflict markers.

evidence.quote: There was an error when converting ../transformers/docs/source/en/model_doc/llama.md to the MDX format.
evidence.reason: Indicates the documentation conversion that failed as a downstream effect of the import/syntax error.

suggested_fix: Open transformers/modeling_utils.py, remove and resolve any merge conflict markers like '<<<<<<< sonic-moe'/'======='/'>>>>>>>', ensure the file contains valid Python, commit the fix, and re-run the documentation build.
